name: Cognee AI Memory Platform
description: Deploy Cognee on Railway in the documented production shape: a private Cognee backend API, a public Cognee MCP service in API/SSE mode, and managed Postgres + pgvector. The default LLM is OpenRouter GPT-4o-mini with Gemini Embedding 2 Preview for embeddings, tuned for a reliable single-user memory deployment.

LLM_API_KEY.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Cognee uses it for the OpenRouter LLM and, by default, for embeddings too.

LLM_PROVIDER.description: Cognee LLM provider for OpenRouter's OpenAI-compatible API

LLM_ENDPOINT.description: OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible API base URL for chat/completions

LLM_MODEL.description: Reliable default OpenRouter model for Cognify extraction, summarization, and responses. Gemma can still be used as an advanced override.

LLM_INSTRUCTOR_MODE.description: Structured-output mode for the OpenRouter-backed LLM adapter

EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT.description: OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible API base URL for embeddings

EMBEDDING_MODEL.description: OpenRouter embedding model for semantic indexing

EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.description: Embedding vector dimensions for Gemini Embedding 2 Preview

EMBEDDING_API_KEY.description: Optional separate OpenRouter API key for embeddings. Leave empty to reuse LLM_API_KEY.

GRAPH_DATABASE_URL.description: Postgres connection string for graph persistence in single-user mode

VECTOR_DATASET_DATABASE_HANDLER.description: Dataset handler aligned with the pgvector backend

GRAPH_DATABASE_PROVIDER.description: Graph database provider for single-user deployments

ENABLE_BACKEND_ACCESS_CONTROL.description: Disable multi-user dataset isolation for a simpler single-user memory deployment

REQUIRE_AUTHENTICATION.description: Disable API auth for a single-user MCP-backed deployment

TRANSPORT_MODE.description: Cognee MCP transport for remote clients. In production API mode, SSE exposes the server at /sse.

API_URL.description: Internal Cognee backend URL used by the MCP service in API mode

MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Comma-separated public hosts allowed by MCP transport security for SSE access

LLM_API_KEY.description: Your OpenRouter API key. The MCP service forwards Cognify and search requests to the backend.

LLM_PROVIDER.description: Cognee LLM provider for OpenRouter's OpenAI-compatible API

LLM_ENDPOINT.description: OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible API base URL for chat/completions

LLM_MODEL.description: Reliable default OpenRouter model for Cognify extraction, summarization, and responses.

EMBEDDING_PROVIDER.description: Embedding provider for semantic indexing on the backend

EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT.description: OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible API base URL for embeddings

EMBEDDING_MODEL.description: OpenRouter embedding model for semantic indexing on the backend

EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.description: Embedding vector dimensions for Gemini Embedding 2 Preview

EMBEDDING_API_KEY.description: Optional separate OpenRouter API key for embeddings. Leave empty to reuse LLM_API_KEY.
